summary: Completed comprehensive testing of bilingual e-commerce store after axios withCredentials fix. Major improvement in authentication flows - admin login, user registration, and cart functionality now working. Backend APIs mostly functional (10/13 tests passed). Critical issue: Language toggle functionality missing despite bilingual requirement.

minor_issues.issue: Network timeout during invalid login test
minor_issues.impact: Test reliability issue, not functional issue

minor_issues.issue: Network timeout during unauthorized access test
minor_issues.impact: Test reliability issue, not functional issue

ui_bugs.issue: Language toggle button not found or not functional - critical for bilingual store requirement
Cart sheet does not open when clicking cart button, despite cart functionality working

integration_issues.issue: No language toggle functionality found - app should support Arabic/English with RTL

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section, categories, and featured products
Products page shows all products with search and filter functionality
Product detail page shows Add to Cart and Buy Now buttons
Admin login flow works correctly with admin@store.com / Admin123!
Add product to cart functionality works (cart icon shows item count)
Admin dashboard accessible with stats and product management
Backend products API working (including search, featured products, product detail)
Backend user registration and login working
Backend admin authentication and stats API working
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Implement missing language toggle functionality for bilingual (Arabic/English) support with RTL direction. HIGH: Fix cart sheet opening issue - cart functionality works but sheet UI doesn't open. The axios withCredentials fix resolved authentication issues successfully.
